package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for service_method_accepts_map_string_any_input: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services that use map-shaped dynamic input instead of typed request contracts.
type CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputModel
}

type CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInput(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputDTO) error {
    focus := "service_method_accepts_map_string"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputService{repo: &CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    service_method_accepts_map_string_positive := map[string]int{"service": 1, "method": 2, "accepts": 3, "map": 4, "string": 5, "any": 6}
    service_method_accepts_map_string_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_positive_0 := CaseServiceMethodAcceptsMapStringAnyInputDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_positive_0
    method_positive_1 := service_method_accepts_map_string_positive["method"] + len(input)
    _ = method_positive_1
    accepts_positive_2 := service_method_accepts_map_string_positive["accepts"] + len(input)
    _ = accepts_positive_2
    map_positive_3 := service_method_accepts_map_string_positive["map"] + len(input)
    _ = map_positive_3
    string_positive_4 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_4
    any_positive_5 := service_method_accepts_map_string_positive["any"] + len(input)
    _ = any_positive_5
    return nil
}
